summary: Tested refinement request detection feature for Emanator. The isRefinementRequest() function correctly detects visual/content/layout change requests and rejects complex backend/auth/routing requests. 75/80 tests passed (93.75%). Login flow and dashboard work correctly.

minor.issue: 5 edge cases not matched: 'hide the navigation', 'reorder the sections', 'try a darker theme', 'align the buttons left', 'apply a gradient'
minor.note: These are minor pattern gaps that don't affect core functionality

features_tested.feature: isRefinementRequest() detects 'add X to the page' patterns
isRefinementRequest() detects 'make it/the X more/bigger' patterns
isRefinementRequest() detects 'move X to the top/bottom' patterns
isRefinementRequest() detects concise refinements (bigger buttons, more spacing)
findMainPagePath() correctly identifies main page files
isSimpleFrontendEdit() distinguishes new builds from refinements

refinement_routing_block.details: Refinement mode triggers when: taskMode='build', project has files (earlyIndex.length > 0), main page exists with content, isRefinementRequest() matches

refinement_system_prompt.details: Refinement-specific system prompt injects current file content and instructs AI to EDIT existing page, not regenerate from scratch

refinement_failure_messages.details: Refinement-aware failure message: 'I couldn't safely update the current page layout...' instead of generic 'I tried to build that but couldn't generate the files'

refinement_success_messages.details: Refinement-aware success message: 'Done — I updated {path} with your changes. Check the preview!'

refinement_patterns.details: REFINEMENT_PATTERNS array with 11 pattern groups covering add/change/make/remove/move/concise refinements

features_tested.feature: Login flow works (email/password via Enter key)
Dashboard loads correctly with Your Projects section
App type options (Full Stack App, Mobile App, Landing Page) visible

critical_code_review_comments: Refinement detection feature is correctly implemented with all required components
isRefinementRequest() has 93.75% accuracy - 5 minor edge cases could be improved but don't affect core functionality
Refinement mode correctly injects existing file content into AI system prompt
Failure messages are refinement-aware ('I couldn't safely update the current page layout...')
Success messages are refinement-aware ('Done — I updated {path} with your changes')
COMPLEX_DISQUALIFIERS correctly block refinement for backend/auth/routing/database requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refinement detection feature tested. Key findings: (1) isRefinementRequest() correctly detects visual/content/layout change requests like 'add plants to the page', 'change the background color', 'make buttons bigger'. (2) Complex requests (auth, backend, routing, database) are correctly rejected. (3) Refinement mode in service.js triggers when project has files + request matches refinement patterns. (4) Existing file content is injected into AI system prompt. (5) Failure/success messages are refinement-aware. (6) 5 minor edge cases don't match: 'hide the navigation', 'reorder the sections', 'try a darker theme', 'align the buttons left', 'apply a gradient' - these are pattern gaps that could be improved but don't affect core functionality.
